## Summary
Provide a brief summary of the changes made and the issue being addressed.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code Refactoring / Optimization (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation Update

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style/formatting guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have verified that all TypeScript compilations pass without warnings (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] I have verified that the production build completes successfully (`npm run build`)
- [ ] I have added/modified Firestore Security Rules if there are database changes

## Screen Recordings / Visual Aids
(If applicable, paste screenshots or links to recordings illustrating UI/UX changes)
